name: Census
description: Monitor Census reverse ETL data pipelines for warehouse-to-destination sync compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Census at https://app.getcensus.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Census Settings → API Keys

checks.description: Verifies Census source connections are configured for structured data pipeline management

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Census syncs are running to keep downstream tools updated
